items.title: Coinbase Stock Falls Today – Mizuho’s Price Target Cut Takes Away Nearly 40% Of Upside Potential
items.description: Mizuho analyst Dan Dolev lowered Coinbase's price target from $280 to $170, eroding nearly 40% of its upside case, according to TheFly.
